headline: GENERAC ACQUIRES BELVIDERE, ILLINOIS FACILITY TO EXPAND LARGE-MEGAWATT GENERATOR PACKAGING CAPACITY
summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC), a leading global designer, manufacturer and provider of energy technology solutions and other power products, announced the acquisition of a new facility in Belvidere, Illinois. The investment will significantly expand the company's packaging capacity for large-megawatt (MW) generators as demand continues to accelerate across key sectors.

headline: Generac: The AI Grid Resiliency Trade Has Only Started
summary: Generac is transitioning from a hurricane-driven generator provider to a critical AI data center infrastructure supplier. Click here to read more.
